## Checklist

- [ ] CI passed
- [ ] public behavior changes are reflected in CHANGELOG.md
- [ ] coverage policy docs still match the actual gate
- [ ] any security exception change is reflected in docs/governance/security-exceptions.md
- [ ] README or runbook was updated if the operator-facing path changed
- [ ] release-affecting changes include smoke-test and rollback notes
